title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Kinemon, Unknown person #8 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Man, I knew you'd make a huge mess of things, jaggy!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Like you're one to talk, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's rich coming from you, RORONOA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: These guys are all ridic-ulous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Check it out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Cover your ears!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Boom! >

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should we go after them? It could be a big win for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: forget it. Leave it to the rat- catchers.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want all of you searching for information on Yamato.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: getting him would be an even bigger win.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Don't let sasaki beat you to it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What did Queen say again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He wanted to wipe somebody out?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, that makes two of us...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maaaama Mamaama....!! Looks like they finally got in touch...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship's in good shape, from the sound of it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So they should be here soon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's strange, though. There's been no sign of a ship at the appointed port.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...port? What are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Current location

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kin'Emon leads the Eastern Army.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WORD OF THE SAMURAI'S ARRIVAL HAS YET TO REACH THEIR FOES.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Samuel, in response to that fact...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: are modifying their strategy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Rather than sending the full force to the rear entrance...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Halfway up the mountain path, they will split into two groups.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Half will breach the keep from the dome of the skull.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: there, they will pose as the enemy, and await the moment of battle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Current location

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they are successful, they will have kaido and orochi in a pincer movement.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But a miscalculation has arisen. An addition not listed on their outdated maps.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A watering hole, full of blooming wisteria, spanned by a long bridge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A bridge in clear view of a brothel.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kinemon! That's a brothel~!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can hardly walk more than 2,000 soldiers across this bridge without raising suspicion...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here stands the domain of black Maria.

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: One of the flying six.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
